description: Registers consumer repositories whose live .github/workflows files are exact-managed from canonical starter templates in this shared workflow asset library.

managedBindings.notes: Automation branches and PRs for this consumer must be based on dev. Consumer repo must provide the vars and secrets expected by the shared CodeRabbit PR trigger template.
Automation branches and PRs for this consumer must be based on dev. Consumer repo must provide the vars and secrets expected by the shared CodeRabbit manual trigger template.
Automation branches and PRs for this consumer must be based on dev. Consumer repo must provide the vars and secrets expected by the shared CodeRabbit comment trigger template.
